description: Sector overlay for U.S. healthcare providers, health plans, clearinghouses, business associates, health facilities, medical products, and health-data documentation.

metadata.scope: United States-only sector overlay controls for Health. Intended to be used with core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official U.S. federal regulatory sources and widely used U.S. model/professional sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance. State-specific requirements may apply.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: HIPAA Security Rule
primary_sources.issuer: U.S. Department of Health and Human Services

primary_sources.name: HIPAA Covered Entities and Business Associates
primary_sources.issuer: U.S. Department of Health and Human Services

primary_sources.name: CMS Conditions of Participation and Conditions for Coverage

rules.title: HIPAA privacy/security evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for HIPAA, PHI/ePHI, privacy, security, or patient-rights language.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Business associate agreement or covered-entity routing evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for business associate agreements, covered entity, permitted uses/disclosures, or subcontractor safeguards.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: HHS Covered Entities and Business Associates

rules.title: CMS Conditions of Participation/Coverage evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for CMS, Conditions of Participation, Conditions for Coverage, accreditation, or quality/safety standards.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Breach notification or security incident evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for breach notification, security incident, unauthorized disclosure, risk assessment, or remediation evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: FDA-regulated product or device control evidence is present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for FDA, medical device, drug, labeling, adverse event, quality system, or product registration evidence.
